_decision.title: B4-v3 corpus-spec-v3.json — task prompt SHA-256 invariant
_decision.rationale: Content-addresses the 5 task prompts so the harness can detect prompt drift before spending API budget. SHA-256 hashes match tasks.json (the authoritative manifest). Any divergence between corpus-spec-v3.json and tasks.json is a sign that tasks.json was updated without a new corpus-spec version. The harness verify.mjs enforces these hashes at startup. Locked by WI-B4-V3-HARNESS-INTEGRATION (#668).
